subject: Fermi GBM trigger 567868083/181230547 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (Politecnico & INFN Bari)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM)
trigger 567868083/181230547 at 13:07:58.59 UT
on 30 December 2018, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to particle activity."
